title: DESIGN GROUP Kids Create Children's Craft Your Own Christmas Jumper Merry & Bright Upcycle
features: AMAZING XMAS FUN: Have family fun this Christmas with this Kids Create Craft Your Own Christmas Jumper kit. Make you own festive jumper design using these self adhesive shapes and letters
UPCYCLE YOUR OLD JUMPERS: Upcycling is a great form of recycling, why throw away old clothes when they can be upcycled into a fun new Christmas jumper, while giving the kids something fun to do

HELP CHILDREN DEVELOP REAL WORLD SKILLS: This crafting kit helps young children develop fine-motor, visual, and tactile-sensory skills - all while having fun, creating a Christmas jumper, and expressing themselves!
CONTAINS ALL YOU NEED: Pack includes self adhesive felt characters, felt shapes and 'Merry & Bright' text (Please note that Jumper is not included)
PERFECT GIFT FOR CHILDREN: This is a great Christmas gift for children which can allow them to spend some creative time over Christmas decorating one of their or your jumpers. Suitable for ages 5+
description: This Kids Create make your own Christmas jumper pack enables children to Upcycle an old Jumper and make it into a festive Christmas masterpiece. With a mix of assorted felt shapes, characters and 'Merry & Bright' text they can transform one of their own or perhaps one of dads jumpers. All the parts are self adhesive, easy to attach, but should be removed before washing. Suitable age 5+
